falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above the 200-day MA by 5% would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, refuting the current HOLD and UNKNOWN status.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the historical analogy, making the current UNKNOWN verdict untenable.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
